subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual essence! Thou hast recited verses of thy gratitude to God, inasmuch as He hath guided thee unto His ancient Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الجوهره الروحیه قد تلوت ایات شکرک لله بما هداک الی ملکوته القدیم و اشرق
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @the concourse on high, @spiritual transformation
